quote_of_day.text:
Why is chuttad pradesh and peehar so subhuman?
Ugly, uncouth, bad-natured people,
low trust soycieties plagued with corruption, tribalism and crime.
What causes it?
quote_of_day.name: Anon
quote_of_day.topic: rants about native place, society issues

articles.title: Weather on the board today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of female body appreciation moved into the board's atmosphere today, generating a flurry of responses. Anon kicked off the discussion with a post praising female bottoms, sparking a 20-reply squall that dominated the Leading section.

A scattered high-pressure front of YouTube links and speculation developed in the Discourse section, with one anon sharing a video and sparking debate.

Meanwhile, another anon contributed to the discussion with a video of Gobarida, claiming global viewership and generating 15 replies.

A brief but intense downpour of links and commentary hit the Notices section, with one anon sharing a link to Kiked.com and another inquiring about solar panel electricity generation and its impact on their electricity bill.

articles.title: Anon Praises Female Bottoms, Discussion Ensues
articles.body:
Anon started a thread saying 'Let's appreciate female bottoms here. Coom threads are not getting any traction, seems like nu-inchtrds are low-test.' One anon replied with several links to explicit content, seemingly in support of the original post.

Another anon expressed concern about the size of their own genitalia, stating 'Mine is barely 5 inch.

That looks too deep and I don't think it can even go inside there.' A respondent claimed that Indians have 'sorry looking flat asses,' which allegedly causes people to focus more on breasts.

Anon countered this by stating that appreciating buttocks is part of 'black men culture,' while 'trve aryans only care more about the bosoms.' The conversation took a turn when one participant warned others not to search for 'BIG INDIAN ASS' on Google Images, calling it 'the WORST MISTAKE OF MY LIFE.' Others shared their own experiences or opinions on the matter, with one stating 'Holy shit i have bigger ass than this bitch wtf. its so flat' and another describing it as 'just fucking Low hanging Fat.' Some anons made claims about their own anatomy or sexual prowess.

One claimed 'My peepee can fit there too.' Another announced their decision to quit porn for a week, stating 'I'm so tired of porn gonna quit for a week.' The thread also included some tangents, such as a brief discussion about using different search engines for explicit content.

One anon mentioned using Yandex, saying 'I use yandex, my bad saar.' Throughout the conversation, anons shared their opinions on female anatomy, sexual preferences, and internet search habits.

articles.title: Anon shares YouTube links, speculation ensues
articles.body:
Anon started the thread with a post containing no text. Anon then shared multiple YouTube links, seemingly using the imageboard as free digital storage.

Another anon noted this, stating that posters are using Indiachan for this purpose because traffic is low and they expect their content to remain available as long as needed.

One anon expressed frustration with unnecessary posts being bumped, asking another poster to sage their message. Others responded with brief comments, including one who mentioned cross-pollination garbage and advised ignoring it.

Another anon referenced a post from /int/ and asked if this was related to the Turk. The thread also included some seemingly unrelated posts, with one anon asking for context and another inquiring about how to do something referred to as 'ts'.

A few anons exchanged brief phrases, including 'tuff' and 'Yaar haggu'. The conversation meandered, with no clear topic or resolution. Anons continued to share YouTube links and make brief comments. One poster referenced a video, https://youtu.be/mZeSUVPwj7A, possibly in response to earlier content.

articles.title: Anon shares video of Gobarida, claims people globally are watching
articles.body:
Anon posted a video of Gobarida with the caption 'PEOPLE FROM ACROSS THE GLOBE ARE WATCHING THIS BTW'.

One respondent questioned the content, asking 'What am I looking at?' Another anon replied, suggesting it was a person wearing a lungi and a cap, and another described it as 'a friendly reminder that we do indeed live in a dysgenic, gynocentric shithole'.

Anon also engaged in discussion about the video, with one claiming 'This gobar reproduced btw, and you probably won't'. Another respondent joked about the amount of 'gobbar' being shared. The thread included several brief comments and reactions to the video.

One anon described seeing 'gorimem amrit to my eyes'. The discussion remained focused on the video and reactions to it, without diverging into other topics.

articles.title: Anon shares link to Kiked.com
articles.body:
Anon posted a link to Kiked.com, saying "This pajeet is living my Dream". One respondent called the person on Kiked.com a "cuck" for converting to Judaism, adding "what a fucking cuck.

And imagine getting BJ's while that nose touches your dick." Another claimed Jews are responsible for "a lot of degeneracy and crap." One more said "All semites are equally cancers", telling someone to "Stop sucking jews just because you hate muslims." A user also mentioned being a "kattar hindu".

articles.title: Solar Panel Electricity Generation Queries
articles.body:
Anon shared their experience with a solar panel system, stating it produces 22 units of import and 11 units of export, effectively halving their electricity bill during summer.

Another anon questioned these numbers, suggesting a 6kw system should produce more than 11kwh daily, citing examples of others' experiences with similar systems.

The OP clarified that their daily export average over 10 days is 11 kwh.

Anon also inquired about the system's specifications, asking if it is grid-tied and the wattage of the panels. The OP mentioned 10 panels but did not provide detailed specifications.
